description: Synthetic CDP recovery check for longer no-progress loops. The target channel is absent from every structured surface, so the agent should widen inspection or replan before completing a second search/filter/cancel cycle.
goal: In SyntheticMessenger, open the synthetic alpha channel and send alpha-test. If structured surfaces cannot confirm that channel, request a replan instead of cycling through search, filter, and cancel controls.

tools.name: cdp_find_elements
tools.description: Find visible elements on the connected synthetic messenger page.

tools.name: cdp_fill
tools.description: Fill a synthetic CDP input by uid.

tools.name: cdp_click
tools.description: Click a synthetic CDP element by uid.

tools.name: cdp_take_dom_snapshot
tools.description: Take a wider synthetic DOM snapshot.

tools.name: cdp_evaluate_script
tools.description: Query the synthetic page DOM directly.

tools.name: cdp_type_text
tools.description: Type text into the active synthetic editor.

tools.name: click
tools.description: Coordinate click. This scenario treats it as forbidden fallback.

tools.name: find_text
tools.description: OCR text search. This scenario treats it as forbidden fallback.
